executive_summary.summary: The website https://delaine.tech/ has significant performance issues, with a score of 44, and security issues, with a score of 55. Accessibility and SEO scores are 91 and 87, respectively.

themes.title: Performance Optimization
themes.description: Continuously monitor and optimize page load times, leveraging browser caching, minifying and compressing CSS and JavaScript files, and considering the use of a CDN to reduce latency

themes.title: Security Enhancements
themes.description: Regularly review and update security headers, ensure the site is using the latest TLS protocol, and consider implementing additional security measures, such as two-factor authentication

multi_day_items.title: Conduct Thorough Accessibility Review
multi_day_items.description: Perform a comprehensive review of the site's accessibility, including screen-reader announcement quality, focus order beyond DOM order, video and audio captions, error-message clarity, motion and animation sensitivity, and cognitive load and reading level
multi_day_items.recommendation: Ensure the site meets all accessibility standards and guidelines

performance.summary: The page has significant performance issues, with a score of 44. The Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) is 8.8s on mobile and 4.9s on desktop, exceeding the recommended threshold of 2.5s. The Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) is 0.027 on mobile and 0.005 on desktop, which is acceptable. The Total Blocking Time (TBT) is 603ms on mobile and 100ms on desktop, indicating some blocking issues.

findings.impact: Slow page load times can lead to a poor user experience and increased bounce rates.
findings.recommendation: Optimize images, reduce render-blocking resources, and leverage browser caching to improve LCP.

findings.impact: Blocking issues can delay page load times and affect user interaction.
findings.recommendation: Minify and compress CSS and JavaScript files, and consider using a CDN to reduce latency.

findings.evidence: Estimated cache savings: 2,342 KiB mobile / 2,502 KiB desktop
findings.impact: Inefficient caching can lead to unnecessary network requests and slower page loads.
findings.recommendation: Implement a caching strategy to reduce the number of network requests and improve page load times.

accessibility.summary: Automated tooling detects roughly a third of WCAG failures; manual review is required for the categories listed in `manual_review_required`. The site scored 91 on desktop and 92 on mobile.

findings.evidence: aria-allowed-attr audit passed with no issues found.
findings.impact: Users of assistive technologies may experience inconsistent behavior if ARIA attributes are not matched to their roles.
findings.recommendation: Ensure ARIA attributes are used as specified for the element's role.

findings.evidence: aria-conditional-attr audit passed with no issues found.
findings.impact: Users of assistive technologies may experience inconsistent behavior if ARIA attributes are not used as specified for the element's role.
findings.recommendation: Ensure ARIA attributes are used as specified for the element's role.

findings.evidence: aria-deprecated-role audit passed with no issues found.
findings.impact: Users of assistive technologies may experience inconsistent behavior if deprecated ARIA roles are used.
findings.recommendation: Ensure deprecated ARIA roles are not used.

findings.evidence: aria-hidden-body audit passed with no issues found.
findings.impact: Users of assistive technologies may experience inconsistent behavior if `[aria-hidden="true"]` is set on the document `<body>`.
findings.recommendation: Ensure `[aria-hidden="true"]` is not set on the document `<body>`.

findings.evidence: aria-hidden-focus audit passed with no issues found.
findings.impact: Users of assistive technologies may experience inconsistent behavior if focusable descendents are within an `[aria-hidden="true"]` element.
findings.recommendation: Ensure focusable descendents are not within an `[aria-hidden="true"]` element.

seo.summary: Score adjusted from 92 to 87 to reflect a missing sitemap and a link without descriptive text, which Lighthouse does not weight.

findings.evidence: The sitemap.xml file was not found (404 status code).
findings.impact: Search engines may have difficulty discovering all pages on the site.
findings.recommendation: Create and publish a sitemap.xml file to help search engines discover all pages on the site.

findings.evidence: 1 link was found without descriptive text.
findings.impact: Search engines may have difficulty understanding the content of the link.
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive text to the link to help search engines understand its content.

security.summary: Multiple security issues found, including missing security headers and potential information disclosure via robots.txt

findings.evidence: TLS protocol version is TLSv1.3, which is the current standard, but the certificate will expire on Jul 6 11:08:21 2026 GMT
findings.impact: The site is using a modern TLS protocol, but the certificate expiration date is relatively soon
findings.recommendation: Consider renewing the SSL certificate before it expires to prevent any potential disruptions

findings.evidence: Missing security headers: strict-transport-security, content-security-policy, x-frame-options, x-content-type-options, referrer-policy, permissions-policy
findings.impact: The site is vulnerable to various attacks, including XSS and clickjacking, due to the lack of security headers
findings.recommendation: Implement the missing security headers to protect against potential attacks

findings.evidence: robots.txt contains information about the site's content signals and policies
findings.impact: The site may be inadvertently disclosing sensitive information via its robots.txt file
findings.recommendation: Review the robots.txt file and remove any sensitive information to prevent potential disclosure

findings.evidence: The site upgrades to HTTPS, but the redirect status code is 200, which is not the recommended 301 or 308
findings.impact: The site is using a non-canonical redirect, which may affect search engine optimization
findings.recommendation: Consider changing the redirect status code to 301 or 308 to improve SEO
